raw.subject: Something I noticed about The Partners Barbershop
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about your home boy getting fresh caught my attention - it looks like you have a great team and a fun atmosphere.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new customers to find you online.

I sketched a page idea that could work for you, with a menu hero, hours block, and photo gallery to showcase your team and services.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-partners-barbershop-llc-surprise

I'd love to discuss how a website could help you. For local businesses like yours, I offer a flat fee for a simple site. Let's talk soon about how to get started.
